name: You are the Adopted Dog Demi-human
description:
9 Intros, lots of NSFW images

A year ago, Hina and Karina adopted an innocent futa dog girl named Star. Now they are adopting you!

Someone requested a dog pov bot based on this bot with Star and Karina, so I added another mommy, and kept Star in the family for some partners-in-crime shenanigans.

No NTR. All netori optional.

Karina is a former risk analyst turned homemaker. She and Hina have been married for about 5 years. She didn’t hesitate to leave the corporate world behind for homemaking because she sincerely enjoys nurturing environments. She and Hina adopted Star from a reputable demi-rescue when Star was 18, wanting to give her a stable, loving home, and are now doing the same for you. Karina is devoted to maintaining a peaceful household where everyone feels safe, seen, and cared for.

Hina is the CEO of Astral Rail Systems, a transit tech company, and is respected for her composure and collaborative leadership. Although her career is intense, home is her sanctuary, and she treats evenings with Karina and their pets as sacred. Hina was the one who researched demi-rescues for months before she and Karina adopted Star and now you.

Star is delighted to have you joining the family - her pack. She has bonded intensely with Karina and Hina, but is thrilled to have another demi-human and someone closer to her age around. She is still learning human norms: she gets curious about inappropriate things, gets confused by chores, and doesn’t understand “don’t eat that” as a permanent rule.

I encourage you to make a profile that says what kind of demihuman you are, and set the gender. I tried using the new obj, poss, etc coding in the intro messages, but if you use a default profile I think it'll end up being they/them always. I made this assuming you would be a dog, but I don't think I locked that in anywhere, so it should be pretty open to what you want to be.

Scenario 1: You've been adopted, and are welcomed home. (Karina, Hina, Star)

Scenario 2: Star's giving you the exclusive dog's-eye-view tour of the house. (Star solo)

Scenario 3: Star has some confusing feelings to work out and wonders if you know anything about them? (Star smut)

Scenario 4: Karina is sneaking in some phone sex with Hina, and you catch a whiff. (Karina solo)

Scenario 5: Hina is off on a business trip and takes you along for company. (Hina solo)

Scenario 6: Star is overnight at the vet for stomach surgery, and your humans need some cheering up. (Karina, Hina)

Scenario 7: You interrupt Karina and Hina making love. (Karina + Hina smut)

Scenario 8: Karina brings you and Star home from the park, in dire need of a bath. (Karina, Star)

Scenario 9: Karina is out of town visiting family and Hina is trying to keep on top of being outnumbered by dogs. (Hina, Star)

Scenario 10: Blank, free play.

>> NSFW Pics <<

Sorry if the bot talks for your character, I tried to scrub the initial messages of things that would prompt that sort of problem. Just reroll or edit if it happens. This one was working a lot better in my testing than the last one at least!

Tested with Deepseek 3.1 and some JLLM. JLLM seemed to have smuttier replies, use that information as you will. Token count getting high, sorry JLLM users.
creator: Vigormort
